code: export const indianIndustries=["Agriculture","Automotive","Banking & Finance","Biotechnology","Capital Goods","Chemicals","Construction","Defence Manufacturing","Education","Electronics System Design & Manufacturing","Engineering","FMCG (Fast Moving Consumer Goods)","Gems and Jewellery","Healthcare","Infrastructure","IT & BPM (Business Process Management)","Leather & Leather Products","Logistics","Manufacturing","Media and Entertainment","Medical Devices","Metals and Mining","Oil and Gas","Pharmaceuticals","Ports and Shipping","Power & Energy","Railways","Real Estate","Renewable Energy","Retail","Roads and Highways","Science and Technology","Services","Space","Telecommunications","Textiles and Apparel","Tourism and Hospitality"].sort();

sourcesContent:
export const indianIndustries = [
    "Agriculture", "Automotive", "Banking & Finance", "Biotechnology", "Capital Goods",
    "Chemicals", "Construction", "Defence Manufacturing", "Education", "Electronics System Design & Manufacturing",
    "Engineering", "FMCG (Fast Moving Consumer Goods)", "Gems and Jewellery", "Healthcare",
    "Infrastructure", "IT & BPM (Business Process Management)", "Leather & Leather Products",
    "Logistics", "Manufacturing", "Media and Entertainment", "Medical Devices", "Metals and Mining",
    "Oil and Gas", "Pharmaceuticals", "Ports and Shipping", "Power & Energy", "Railways",
    "Real Estate", "Renewable Energy", "Retail", "Roads and Highways", "Science and Technology",
    "Services", "Space", "Telecommunications", "Textiles and Apparel", "Tourism and Hospitality"
].sort();
